evals.prompt: 我在 Web 端用 @tencentcloud/chat SDK 做了多端登录，但是用户在第二个 Tab 打开页面后，第一个 Tab 就收不到消息了。这是什么原因？怎么排查？
evals.expected_output: Should identify this as chat/multi-instance on Web platform. Should read the product overview and web platform slice. Should walk through the troubleshooting tree (check login status, check instance limit, check if kicked offline). Should mention the 10-instance Web limit and the onKickedOffline callback.

Should identify two critical issues: (1) KICKED_OFFLINE listener registered AFTER login instead of before — violates ALWAYS rule #2. (2) Auto-retrying login inside the kicked-offline handler — violates NEVER rule #4, causes infinite kick loop. Should provide fixed code with listener before login and a user prompt dialog instead of auto-retry.

evals.prompt: 我想在我的 Web 应用里实现多设备同时登录 Chat 的功能，从零开始引导我怎么做
evals.expected_output: Should find the chat-multi-device scenario. Should walk through it step by step: console config → SDK init + listener registration → login with status check → kick-offline handling → UserSig renewal. Should present code examples from the Web platform slice. Should end with the verification checklist.
